perturbation: IFN-beta / type-I interferon direct stimulation versus untreated control
geo_gds_query: ("IFN-beta" OR "interferon beta" OR "IFNB" OR "type I interferon") AND "RNA-seq" AND ("Homo sapiens" OR "Mus musculus")
likely_gold_source: MSigDB HALLMARK_INTERFERON_ALPHA_RESPONSE / HALLMARK_INTERFERON_GAMMA_RESPONSE plus canonical JAK-STAT/ISG panel locked before scoring
directness_of_perturbation: high when recombinant IFN-beta/IFN-alpha single-agent versus untreated is used; exclude viral infection, poly(I:C), IFN-gamma-only, and cytokine cocktails
table_availability: high candidate abundance, but active eligibility still depends on full/near-full as-published DEG supplements rather than raw-count reanalysis
organism_cell_breadth: human and mouse; immune, epithelial, endothelial, fibroblast, and cancer-cell models likely represented
major_exclusion_risks: many hits are infection/poly(I:C)/mixed IFN contexts; IFN-alpha vs IFN-beta and type-I vs type-II must not be mixed after lock
activation_requirements: TNF scarcity already documented; requires domain amendment, locked gold targets and catalog rules, then no-output-seen certification before any scoring
notes: Most promising fallback because direct cytokine perturbation and pre-lockable ISG biology are straightforward; still firewall from TNF until amended.

geo_gds_query: ("LPS" OR "lipopolysaccharide" OR "TLR4") AND "RNA-seq" AND ("Homo sapiens" OR "Mus musculus")
likely_gold_source: MSigDB HALLMARK_TNFA_SIGNALING_VIA_NFKB / inflammatory response genes plus curated TLR4 immediate-response panel locked before scoring
directness_of_perturbation: high for purified LPS single-agent cell culture; exclude infection, tolerance/rechallenge unless separately predeclared, and multi-cytokine cocktails
table_availability: very high search abundance; likely many full supplemental DEG tables, but source-family dominance in macrophage literature must be checked
organism_cell_breadth: human and mouse macrophage/monocyte, dendritic, epithelial, endothelial, fibroblast models
major_exclusion_risks: closest to TNF/NF-kB narrative and could look like post-hoc substitution; high duplicate/source-family and LPS-tolerance complexity risk
activation_requirements: requires explicit amendment because the PRD forbids silently replacing TNF with LPS/NF-kB; lock direct LPS-only inclusion rules before scoring
notes: Abundant and biologically canonical but carries the highest domain-shopping optics risk after TNF scarcity.

perturbation: tunicamycin or thapsigargin ER-stress induction versus vehicle/untreated control
geo_gds_query: ("tunicamycin" OR "thapsigargin" OR "ER stress") AND "RNA-seq" AND ("Homo sapiens" OR "Mus musculus")
likely_gold_source: MSigDB unfolded protein response / curated ATF4-XBP1-DDIT3 ER-stress target panel locked before scoring
directness_of_perturbation: moderate-high for single-agent tunicamycin or thapsigargin; separate drugs or lock one primary perturbation to avoid mechanism mixing
table_availability: moderate candidate abundance with likely full DEG supplements in mechanistic papers
organism_cell_breadth: human and mouse; epithelial, cancer, immune, metabolic, organoid models
major_exclusion_risks: stressors have distinct mechanisms; apoptosis/toxicity confounding and heterogeneous dose/timepoint choices require tight predeclared criteria
activation_requirements: domain amendment must decide tunicamycin-only, thapsigargin-only, or explicit ER-stress family before any corpus/gold lock
notes: Good methods-paper contrast away from inflammation if activation is needed, but needs stricter biological boundary than IFN.

perturbation: H2O2/oxidative stress exposure versus untreated/vehicle control
geo_gds_query: ("hydrogen peroxide" OR "H2O2" OR "oxidative stress") AND "RNA-seq" AND ("Homo sapiens" OR "Mus musculus")
likely_gold_source: NRF2/oxidative-stress canonical target panel from MSigDB/KEAP1-NFE2L2 literature locked before scoring
likely_independent_units: 5+ likely but direct H2O2-only table audit required
directness_of_perturbation: moderate; direct H2O2 is clear but many hits are disease models, hypoxia, radiation, drugs, or indirect oxidative-stress readouts
table_availability: high broad search abundance but lower expected precision for direct perturbation/full-DEG evidence
organism_cell_breadth: broad human/mouse cell and tissue models
major_exclusion_risks: semantic search noise, mixed stressors, overlap with existing hypoxia biology, dose toxicity, and indirect disease-context oxidative-stress signatures
activation_requirements: requires amendment and a narrow direct H2O2 or NRF2-activator rule before any output generation
notes: Abundant but noisier than IFN/LPS; better as secondary fallback if direct as-published tables are plentiful.

perturbation: acute heat-shock exposure versus normothermic control
geo_gds_query: ("heat shock" OR "HSF1") AND "RNA-seq" AND ("Homo sapiens" OR "Mus musculus")
likely_gold_source: MSigDB heat-shock/HSF1 response genes plus canonical HSPA/HSPB/DNAJ target panel locked before scoring
directness_of_perturbation: high when temperature/timepoint is explicitly heat shock versus control
table_availability: moderate; fewer hits than inflammation/IFN but often clear perturbation design
organism_cell_breadth: human and mouse; cell lines, primary cells, developmental and stress models
major_exclusion_risks: HSF1 genetic perturbation hits are not heat shock; organism/tissue developmental heat stress may not match direct cell perturbation
activation_requirements: requires amendment with direct heat-shock-only inclusion and prelocked HSF1/heat-shock gold panel
notes: Clean directness but may be underpowered for >=8-10 full as-published DEG tables.

geo_gds_query: ("TGF-beta" OR "TGFb" OR "TGFB1") AND ("EMT" OR "epithelial mesenchymal") AND "RNA-seq" AND ("Homo sapiens" OR "Mus musculus")
likely_gold_source: MSigDB EMT hallmark plus curated TGFB/SMAD EMT targets locked before scoring
likely_independent_units: possibly 5 but source-family and cancer-cell dominance likely
directness_of_perturbation: moderate-high for TGF-beta1 single-agent EMT models; exclude co-stimulation and genetic EMT states
table_availability: moderate; many studies report EMT phenotypes but not always full DEG tables
organism_cell_breadth: human/mouse epithelial, cancer, fibrosis, organoid systems
major_exclusion_risks: EMT biology is broad and often genetic/disease-state rather than direct ligand perturbation; gold panel may be less perturbation-specific
activation_requirements: requires amendment with single-agent TGFB1-vs-control and locked EMT target panel before scoring
notes: Scientifically recognizable but less clean as a cross-domain perturbation benchmark than IFN or LPS.
